LanguageData.P_UseUnsafePatchesDesc: Allows for more things can priortized, but unsafe.
LanguageData.P_UseLowerAsHighPriorityTitle: Use lower priority as high priority
LanguageData.P_DesignatorCellDesc: Paint cells to auto-assign priority to things on those tiles. Synced to thing priority periodically.
LanguageData.P_SelectionOptionsDesc: Filter for Thing Priority designator. Highlights matching things on the map while selected.
LanguageData.P_SetPriorityDesc: Three preset buttons on the architect bar: negative, 0, positive. Left-click to apply; right-click negative/positive to choose ±1–±5 (saved in mod settings).
LanguageData.P_PriorityNegativeDesc: Left-click to select this negative priority. Right-click to choose a preset (−1 to −5).
LanguageData.P_PriorityPositiveDesc: Left-click to select this positive priority. Right-click to choose a preset (+1 to +5).
